engine.ladder_reasoning: The site's spine is browsing 100+ coloring books whose cover art and interior sample galleries ARE the proof; the illustrators' work sells the purchase, no credential/feature argument. Portfolio-is-proof → work.

goal.one_action: Pick a coloring book and buy it on an external marketplace (Amazon/Etsy/Lulu)

structure.archetype_note: Home = curated grids of releases/categories; Books = full 100+ catalog; per-book product pages with description + sample gallery + related grids; buying always offloads off-site. No prices or checkout anywhere.

mapped.observed_as: Cozy / Bold and Easy / Color by Number Coloring Books
View All Coloring Books / Buy on Amazon
Join Our Coloring Community / Watch Coloring Videos
repeated footer link cluster (Paperbacks/Digital Editions/Legal/Licensing/Amazon Associates)

unmapped.observed: Jade Summer Collection — full grid of 100+ books, newest-to-oldest, no prices
unmapped.why_no_fit: A browsable own-works catalog page is the site's spine; no canonical section id for a paginated works listing

unmapped.observed: Product page: description + sample gallery + three related-books grids
unmapped.why_no_fit: A per-work detail page (own product with off-site buy) has no canonical section — closest is a hero+gallery combo but it functions as a store detail page

proposed_new.name: works-catalog
proposed_new.evidence: Site is a catalogue of the creator's OWN coloring books (100+) as its spine, with per-book subpages, and every buy CTA redirects off-site to Amazon/Etsy/Lulu; no on-site cart or prices.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full; 5 representative pages incl. home/catalog/product/about/support with clear CTAs, forms, embeds, and commerce=offloaded signals.

gap_findings: works-catalog: the whole site is a 100+ own-works catalog whose conversion is an off-site marketplace redirect — closed vocab 'catalog' implies own on-site commerce and doesn't capture the redirect-to-store spine.

No canonical section id for a full browsable catalog/works listing page or for a product-detail page (description + gallery + related) — these are core to catalog/works sites yet get shoehorned into features/gallery/miscellaneous.
Multiple redirect destinations per item (Amazon/Etsy/Lulu) — goal mechanism 'redirect' can't express fan-out to several stores; delegated_to='store' collapses three marketplaces.
